projectDescription: A WinUI-inspired control library for Avalonia that brings Fluent Design System components and theming to cross-platform .NET desktop applications.
keyFeatures: WinUI-inspired controls including NavigationView, TabView, ContentDialog, TaskDialog, CommandBar, TeachingTip, InfoBar, BreadcrumbBar, NumberBox, RangeSlider, SettingsExpander, and InfoBadge
FluentAvaloniaTheme with automatic system theme (light/dark/high contrast) and accent color detection on Windows, macOS, and Linux
Custom icon system with SymbolIcon, FontIcon, BitmapIcon, PathIcon, and ImageIcon supporting Fluent Design icons
AppWindow with custom title bar support, splash screens, and native windowing integration on Windows
Frame-based navigation system with page stack management and navigation transition animations
Cross-platform support for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, and WebAssembly
Published as FluentAvaloniaUI NuGet package targeting net10.0
publicApiSurface: FluentAvaloniaTheme (Styling namespace) - theme manager with PreferSystemTheme, PreferUserAccentColor, CustomAccentColor
NavigationView, NavigationViewItem - WinUI-style navigation sidebar/top bar control
Frame - page navigation host with GoBack/GoForward and page stack
TabView, TabViewItem - browser-style tab strip with drag reordering
ContentDialog - modal dialog with primary/secondary/close buttons
TaskDialog - feature-rich dialog with commands, radio buttons, checkboxes, and progress
InfoBar - inline notification bar with severity levels
TeachingTip - contextual teaching callout control
InfoBadge - small badge overlay for notification counts/status
BreadcrumbBar, BreadcrumbBarItem - hierarchical navigation breadcrumb
CommandBar, CommandBarButton, CommandBarToggleButton, CommandBarSeparator - app toolbar
NumberBox - numeric input with expression evaluation support
RangeSlider - dual-thumb range selection slider
SettingsExpander, SettingsExpanderItem - expandable settings group
SymbolIcon, FontIcon, BitmapIcon, PathIcon, ImageIcon, IconSourceElement - icon elements
AppWindow, AppWindowTitleBar - custom window chrome and title bar
NavigationTransitionInfo - page transition animations (DrillIn, Entrance, Slide, Suppress)
XamlUICommand, StandardUICommand - reusable command with icon/label
FAUISettings - global animation and behavior settings
Color2 - extended color struct with HSV/HSL manipulation
